entities.name: FUSARIUM SEMITECTUM VAR. MAJUS
entities.description: A fungus isolated from pearl millet and tested as a biological control agent against ergot

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The host crop Pennisetum americanum infected by Claviceps fusiformis

entities.name: CLAVICEPS FUSIFORMIS
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes ergot in pearl millet

entities.name: ERGOT
entities.description: The disease caused by Claviceps fusiformis in pearl millet

entities.name: OVARY COLONIZATION
entities.description: The extent to which F. semitectum var. majus colonizes the ovary of pearl millet

entities.name: SCLEROTIA FORMATION
entities.description: The process of sclerotia formation by C. fusiformis, which is reduced by F. semitectum var. majus

entities.name: SCLEROTIA COLONIZATION
entities.description: The extent to which F. semitectum var. majus colonizes the sclerotia of C. fusiformis

entities.name: SCLEROTIA DISINTEGRATION
entities.description: The breakdown of sclerotia caused by F. semitectum var. majus

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL CONTROL
entities.description: The use of a living organism to suppress the population of a pathogen

relationships.description: acts as a biocontrol agent against
